stages.title: Stage 1 — Introduction
stages.description: Opening mood. Friendly, welcoming, getting comfortable.
stages.scene_description: introduction, greeting, friendly, welcoming, getting comfortable, warm smile
stages.video_prompt: Warm welcoming expression. Friendly soft smile, relaxed natural look.

stages.title: Stage 2 — Building rapport
stages.description: Conversation opens up. More expressive, engaged eye contact.
stages.scene_description: building rapport, conversation, engaged, expressive, eye contact, playful
stages.video_prompt: Engaged expressive look. Playful smile, attentive eye contact.

stages.title: Stage 3 — Flirting
stages.description: Playful tension, teasing energy, closer connection.
stages.scene_description: flirting, teasing, playful tension, seductive glance, closer connection
stages.video_prompt: Flirty teasing expression. Seductive glance, soft confident smile.

stages.title: Stage 4 — Intimacy
stages.description: Deeper emotional connection, softer and more personal.
stages.scene_description: intimacy, emotional connection, soft, personal, intimate eye contact
stages.video_prompt: Soft intimate expression. Gentle personal eye contact, warm mood.

stages.title: Stage 5 — Peak moment
stages.description: Highest intensity for the scenario arc.
stages.scene_description: peak moment, intense emotion, heightened reaction, climax energy
stages.video_prompt: Heightened emotional expression settling into calm satisfaction.
